chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P-S No.987 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For order on office objection 2.For hg of main case 06.11.2024. Mr. Muhammad Faisal, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zubair Ali Khaskheli, advocate for respondent No. 8. Ms. Rubina Khalid, Deputy Prosecutor General a/w Wajid Ali DSP Sakro, Thatta and Ali Anwar, SHO PS Sakro. This application has been filed for recovery of daughter of petitioner, namely, Sharu, aged about 08 years. Wajid Ali DSP Sakro, Thatta has filed a report and submits that an FIR No.123/2024 has been registered against the respondents in PS Mirpur Sakro, Thatta and they have been arrested. He further submits that investigation is ongoing and the progress report will be submitted before the trial court. In view of above, this petition is disposed of. Since the FIR has been registered, Investigating Officer is directed to make efforts for recovery of alleged abductee. JUDGE HANIF
